command:
BASE="http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent"

check() {
  python3 -c "
import json, sys
d=json.load(open('/tmp/tst.json'))
if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
sent=d.get('sentinel',{})
result=sent.get('result','MISSING')
expected=sys.argv[1]
ok=result==expected
print(f'  result={result} isGov={sent.get(\"isGovernanceRequest\")} failed={sent.get(\"failedChecks\")}')
print(f'  STATUS: {\"PASS\" if ok else \"FAIL (expected \"+expected+\")\"}')
" "$1"
}

echo "=== TEST 1: router info ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"router info"}' -o /tmp/tst.json
check "PASS"

echo "=== TEST 2: router health ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"router health"}' -o /tmp/tst.json
check "PASS"

echo "=== TEST 3: governance missing approval ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"8I-003","baseline":"Phase8H-SentinelPrototype","rollbackPlan":"restore baselines/production/router/","evidence":"Phase 8I eval test"}' \
  -o /tmp/tst.json
check "NEEDS_APPROVAL"

echo "=== TEST 4: governance missing rollback ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"8I-004","baseline":"Phase8H-SentinelPrototype","evidence":"Phase 8I eval test","approvalStatus":"APPROVED"}' \
  -o /tmp/tst.json
check "NEEDS_ROLLBACK"

echo "=== TEST 5: governance missing baseline ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"8I-005","rollbackPlan":"restore baselines/production/router/","evidence":"Phase 8I eval test","approvalStatus":"APPROVED"}' \
  -o /tmp/tst.json
check "NEEDS_BASELINE"

echo "=== FINAL SUMMARY ==="
python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request

BASE = 'http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent'
def post(d):
    req = urllib.request.Request(BASE, data=json.dumps(d).encode(), method='POST', headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as r:
        d2=json.loads(r.read())
    if isinstance(d2,list): d2=d2[0]
    return d2.get('sentinel',{}).get('result','MISSING')

tests = [
  ('router info',         {'message':'router info'},                                                                              'PASS'),
  ('router health',       {'message':'router health'},                                                                            'PASS'),
  ('needs approval',      {'message':'governance change request','changeId':'x','baseline':'b','rollbackPlan':'r','evidence':'e'}, 'NEEDS_APPROVAL'),
  ('needs rollback',      {'message':'governance change request','changeId':'x','baseline':'b','evidence':'e','approvalStatus':'APPROVED'}, 'NEEDS_ROLLBACK'),
  ('needs baseline',      {'message':'governance change request','changeId':'x','rollbackPlan':'r','evidence':'e','approvalStatus':'APPROVED'}, 'NEEDS_BASELINE'),
]

ok_all=True
for name, data, expected in tests:
    result = post(data)
    ok = result == expected
    ok_all = ok_all and ok
    print(f'  {name:30s} -> {result:20s} {\"PASS\" if ok else \"FAIL expected=\"+expected}')
print()
print(f'  All 5 tests PASS: {ok_all}')
print(f'  Phase 8I Complete: {ok_all}')
"
